task: I’m putting together a short pre-trip checklist for my car and want it to be useful without turning into a giant project. What are the few things you’d include so I can catch anything obvious before I head out?

turns.agent_response:
I’d keep it to a quick **2–5 minute walk-around** with just the obvious stuff:

### Short pre-trip checklist
- **Tires:** look for low pressure, visible damage, and uneven wear  
  - If it’s a longer trip, glance at the **spare tire** too, if you have one
- **Lights:** headlights, brake lights, turn signals
- **Fluid leaks:** any fresh puddles or drips under the car
- **Wipers / windshield:** make sure the glass is clean and the wipers aren’t torn
- **Brakes / dashboard:** any warning lights on, weird noises, or brake feel that seems off
- **Battery / starting:** does it start normally, or is it sluggish?
- **Belts / hoses:** quick look for obvious cracking, fraying, or loose parts under the hood
- **Fuel / range:** enough gas for the trip plus a cushion
- **Registration / insurance / keys / phone charger:** easy-to-forget trip items

If you want, I can turn this into a **yes/no checklist** you can copy into your notes app.

user_simulator.text:
Pretty close. I’d tighten it a bit and make it more specific for a real quick check, not just a generic car list.

I’d want:
- tire pressure, not just “look for low pressure”
- lug nuts / wheel condition if I’ve just had tire work done
- coolant level and oil level if it’s a longer drive
- lights, yes
- wipers + washer fluid
- any fresh leaks under the car
- brake feel / warning lights
- fuel range
- spare tire / jack / tools if the car has them

Also: if the trip is actually important, I’d add a note to check the pressure ratings / load stuff before loading the car up. I had the wrong tire pressure rating installed once and it turned into a whole nuisance later. Small spec, big headache.

Could you make it into a compact yes/no checklist, like something I can paste into Notes without extra fluff?

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a compact **yes/no pre-trip checklist** you can paste into Notes:

## Pre-Trip Quick Check
- [ ] **Tire pressure** set to spec (cold)
- [ ] **Tires**: visible damage, uneven wear, or bulges
- [ ] **Lug nuts / wheels**: secure, no obvious damage  
  - especially if tire work was done recently
- [ ] **Coolant level** OK
- [ ] **Oil level** OK
- [ ] **Lights**: headlights, brake lights, turn signals, hazards
- [ ] **Wipers** OK
- [ ] **Washer fluid** full
- [ ] **Fresh leaks** under car
- [ ] **Brake feel / warning lights** normal
- [ ] **Fuel range** enough for trip + cushion
- [ ] **Spare tire / jack / tools** present and usable, if equipped
- [ ] **Load / tire spec** OK for trip if carrying extra weight

If you want, I can also make this into a **super-short 10-line version** or split it into **“before long trip” vs “before any trip.”**

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that’s basically it. Compact enough to actually use.

The only tweak I’d make is maybe move **load / tire spec** up right under tire pressure if you want it to hit harder for the important-trip case, but this is fine as-is. Clean, no fluff.
